properties.name: Soho House New York
properties.description: The original US outpost. Rooftop pool overlooking the Hudson, two dedicated cinemas, members bar across six floors of a converted warehouse in the Meatpacking District.

properties.name: Soho House Chicago
properties.description: A former warehouse in Fulton Market. Rooftop pool with views of the city skyline, ground-floor brasserie, dedicated cinema, and one of Chicago's best rooftop bars.

properties.name: Soho House West Hollywood
properties.description: On the Sunset Strip. Outdoor pool deck with panoramic LA views, cinema, rooftop bar, and a sprawling restaurant. The creative industry's living room in LA.

properties.name: Soho House Austin
properties.description: Austin's creative hub on South Congress. Outdoor pool, rooftop bar, cinema, restaurant, and workspaces designed around the city's music and tech culture.

properties.name: Soho House Nashville
properties.description: In Nashville's Gulch neighborhood. Pool, cinema, restaurant, and bars woven into the city's music industry creative scene.

properties.name: Soho House Toronto
properties.description: A heritage building in Toronto's Entertainment District. Indoor pool, spa, cinema, restaurant and workspaces across seven floors.

properties.name: Little Beach House Malibu
properties.description: A beach club right on the sand in Malibu. Outdoor pool, restaurant, bar, and direct Pacific Ocean access. Day and overnight access for members.

properties.name: Soho House (Dean Street)
properties.description: The original Soho House, opened by Nick Jones in 1995 as a private members' club for the Soho film and media crowd. Cinema, restaurant, bars, and rooms.

properties.name: Shoreditch House
properties.description: Rooftop pool with views over East London, cinema, gym, restaurant and members bar. The creative anchor of Shoreditch. Housed in a former Victorian tea warehouse.

properties.name: Electric House
properties.description: Attached to the Electric Cinema on Portobello Road. A neighbourhood club for the Notting Hill creative community. Restaurant, bar, and cinema access.

properties.name: Soho Farmhouse
properties.description: A 100-acre country estate in the Cotswolds with 40 cabins, a boathouse, outdoor pool, spa, cinema barn, and farm-to-table restaurant. The flagship countryside retreat.

properties.name: White City House
properties.description: Inside the BBC's former Television Centre in White City. Indoor rooftop pool, cinema, restaurant, gym, and extensive workspaces for the media and creative industries.

properties.name: Soho House Berlin
properties.description: A 1920s department store in Mitte transformed into Soho House's European flagship. Rooftop pool, cinemas, spa, gym, restaurant, and workspaces across seven floors.

properties.name: Soho House Amsterdam
properties.description: In a canal-side building in central Amsterdam. Restaurant, bar, gym, cinema, and workspaces with the characteristic Dutch light and architecture throughout.

properties.name: Soho House Istanbul
properties.description: In a historic Beyoglu building with Bosphorus views. Pool, cinema, restaurant, and bars bridging European and Asian creative communities.

properties.name: Soho House Barcelona
properties.description: In the El Born neighborhood. Pool, restaurant, cinema, gym, and workspaces set in a historic Catalan building close to the Picasso Museum.

properties.name: Soho House Mumbai
properties.description: Soho House's first Asia location, in Mumbai's Juhu neighbourhood. Outdoor pool, cinema, restaurant, gym, and workspaces for India's booming creative industry.
